title: Expert Consumer Analytics & Insights (m/w/d)
required_skills: First-Party Data, Segmentierungs- und Prognosemodelle (CLV, Churn, Retention)
core_responsibilities: Develop and advance First-Party data strategy and scoring models (RFM, CLV, Churn)
Derive actionable consumer insights from First-Party data and translate into marketing and sales measures
Design, execute, and evaluate A/B and multivariate tests to optimise conversion, basket, retention, and loyalty
Build, maintain, and evolve integrated data reports and dashboards for key stakeholders
Collaborate closely with D2C & eCommerce, Brand Management, Performance Marketing, and CRM teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight customer segmentation and cohort analysis experience explicitly (CLV, retention framing)
Frame e-commerce analytics work in D2C context where possible
Emphasize A/B testing & experiment design as direct match to core responsibility
Lead with data storytelling and executive dashboard experience (cross-stakeholder reporting)
Mention any GDPR/data compliance touchpoints from Hapag-Lloyd or HSBC work
